page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmc8a.48xlarge is an x86_64 architecture bare-metal server instance powered by AMD EPYC 9T24 processors operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The system features 192 physical cores and 192 vCPUs, indicating a configuration with 1.0 thread per core and dedicated CPU allocation. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core.

This server type does not include local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. The instance does not feature integrated graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The lack of hyperthreading and the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio represent a design optimized for raw parallel execution rather than memory-intensive workloads.

Given the high physical core count and dedicated CPU allocation, the instance is structured for compute-heavy workloads such as high-performance computing, batch processing, and large-scale parallel simulations. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the bare-metal architecture eliminates hypervisor overhead, maximizing the return on compute resources for highly parallelized tasks, though the low memory density makes it less suitable for large in-memory databases.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmc8a.48xlarge is an x86_64 bare-metal server powered by AMD EPYC 9T24 processors running at 2.7 GHz. The instance provides 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core and no hyperthreading. It features 384.0 GB of system memory, establishing a compute-focused 2.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. There is no local storage included, and network connectivity is rated at a baseline of 64 Gbps. No GPUs are present on this instance. This hardware profile is designed for parallel processing tasks, high-performance computing, and compute-intensive batch workloads that benefit from dedicated physical cores. The lack of local storage and low memory-to-core ratio represent key architectural tradeoffs, positioning this server for workloads reliant on external storage and high CPU density rather than massive memory footprints.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmc8a.48xlarge is a bare-metal server with 192 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 384 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for highly parallel compute workloads without local storage.
